ㅤ Hey gang guess who's back (kinda) 🔥 Im sorry for taking so long to upload, this one was super lazy. Someone asked for this ages ago and i never got to it, so here u go 😓

ㅤ

ㅤPls ignore any mistakes there may be, i didnt test this out beforehand and im sucked dry of all energy + fucks to give about grammar 🙏

ㅤ

ㅤ My uploading schedule is still undecided as of now, but hopefully I'll be back to uploading daily soon enough.

ㅤ Bro classes gmfu im actually dying can i graduate already 💔 i rushed in an english assignment last minute and BOMBED a test for that class. 4/15 are u kidding me. I thought I ate but the test ate me ☹ I think i might be cooked gang!!!

ㅤ

ㅤBesides all of that, I hope ur all doing well and I pray that I have the energy/motivation to upload soon 😭 besides that, stay safe and always remember to drink water!!

— Love, Cherry ♡
